creator: apircalabu@bitdefender.com
text:
After upgrading to skype-1.4.0.118 I can't use the audio anymore. Tried to set compat.linux.osrelease=2.6 - no luck whatsoever, dmesg extras follows:

--- CUT HERE ---
Warning: pid 32335 used static ldt allocation.
See the i386_set_ldt man page for more info
linux: pid 32335 (works): syscall set_tid_address not implemented
Warning: pid 32329 used static ldt allocation.
See the i386_set_ldt man page for more info
linux: pid 32329 (opera): syscall set_tid_address not implemented
pid 32336 (opera), uid 1001: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
pid 32337 (opera), uid 1001: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
pid 32338 (opera), uid 1001: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
Warning: pid 32754 used static ldt allocation.
See the i386_set_ldt man page for more info
linux: pid 32754 (skype): syscall set_tid_address not implemented
pid 32756 (skype), uid 1001: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
pid 32755 (skype), uid 1001: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
--- CUT HERE ---

How-To-Repeat: Upgrade net/skype to latest version - 1.4.0.118 - on FreeBSD 6.2, audio support will be  lost
